creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Is this feature desirable to have? I mean, what's the problem with
keeping these ports in /usr/X11R6 and moving them together with Xorg
change?

How many ports could use this?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

What do you mean? An African or a European swallow?
